description: Scout is an AI B2B prospecting tool with one-click LinkedIn import, accurate contact data, and AI-personalized emails.
overview: Scout streamlines B2B prospecting with AI, importing leads from LinkedIn, validating contact data in real time, and generating personalized outreach emails.
what_is: Scout is a B2B prospecting tool that simplifies lead generation and outreach using AI and LinkedIn data. It offers accurate contact information with real-time updates and AI email personalization, and lets users import leads from LinkedIn in one click.

It is strongest for teams that need accurate emails and mobile numbers fast, with contacts syncing in real time and automated follow-ups triggered by prospect behavior. Scout integrates with CRMs, outreach tools, and email platforms, focusing on targeted B2B lead generation rather than large-scale multichannel marketing.
